历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 10274 → 9514 → 12739 → 8095 → 12338 respectively. There has been significant fluctuation in recent 5 years, with a large backward shift to 12739 in 2023, a recovery to 8095 in 2024, and another backward shift to 12338 in 2025; the baseline in 2025 is approximately 12338, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4243 positions in the last 2 years, showing an overall oscillating backward trend; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 1825 → 1844 → 1847 → 1817 → 1817 respectively, with the 2025 plan being 1817; the 2026 plan is 1795, a slight reduction of 22 (-1.21%) compared to 2025, which usually eases competition slightly and tends to decrease ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 is 24th → 27th → 27th → 26th → 26th → 26th, stable within the national top 30 in recent years, with a solid tier; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (the bathhouse basket-turning incident at Qianwei Campus) and academic misconduct public opinion, which may suppress some candidates' application willingness; Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure; regarding historical admission anomalies, signals such as the 2022 Henan enrollment gap and the 2023 admission score of 538 indicate that the university has experienced admission fluctuations in some other provinces; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 15 disciplines rated A- or above: Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Physics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Business Administration A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-; advantageous disciplines cover sciences, engineering, medicine, law, humanities and social sciences, with a complete range of disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, and Jilin University has strong disciplinary support in these fields; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 79,825 (estimated based on about 72% of recent years), a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; the provincial control score in 2025 for Physics Category undergraduate batch is 340, special type 479, with 2026 data missing; Jilin University is located in Changchun City, the only 985 university in the province, with a very high proportion of local enrollment (the 2025 Physics Category plan of 1,817 accounts for a large proportion of the university's total national plan), and local candidates usually have strong willingness to apply, but the recent enrollment gap signals from other provinces may indirectly affect local application psychology.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12338, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (-1.21% tends to decrease ranking numbers), a slight decrease in Physics Category examinees, and the negative reputation public opinion that may suppress some application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12198, with a range of 11698–12698.

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated/Bethune Class)

- Law (Lv Zhenyu Class/International Legal Talent Class)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Food Science and Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 12198, range 11698–12698. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11000), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Tang Aoqing Class, Clinical 5+3, Law Lv Zhenyu Class); for rankings near the upper limit (outside 12500), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a safe choice. Jilin University has a complete range of disciplines, and Tier 1 majors are mostly integrated undergraduate-graduate/top-notch classes, with fierce competition but high-quality training resources.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1343、2026年计划小幅扩招（+5.73%使位次数字趋于增大）、历史类考生基本持平、声誉负面舆情可能部分抑制报考热情，但法学/考 古学等王牌学科对高分考生仍有较强吸引力，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有后移（更难进）；预测最低位次约1409名，区间1198–1620名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 1043 → 1589 → 1132 → 1191 → 1343, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. In 2022, it dropped sharply to 1589, rebounded to 1132 in 2023, and stabilized in the 1191–1343 range in 2024–2025. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1343, with a cumulative backward shift of about 211 positions over the past 3 years, showing a slight downward trend. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 197 → 177 → 174 → 198 → 192, with 192 planned for 2025. The 2026 plan is 203, an increase of 11 students (+5.73%) compared to 2025. Expansion typically intensifies competition slightly, leading to larger ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 24th–27th in recent years, ranking 26th in 2026, with a solid level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct controversies, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure. Advantageous disciplines related to History Category: Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Sociology (not separately rated), etc. Archaeology is at the national top level, and Law is one of the Five Schools and Four Departments, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a wait-and-see state, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism & Communication is clearly discouraged. Jilin University's Law (A-level) and Archaeology (A+) strongly attract high-scoring liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the province's History Category candidates are approximately 31,043 (estimated at 28% of total in recent years), basically unchanged from 31,071 in 2025. Jilin University is located in Changchun, the only 985 university in the province, with a relatively high proportion of local enrollment plans for History Category, so local liberal arts candidates generally have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1343, the slight expansion in 2026 (+5.73% leading to larger ranking numbers), the basically unchanged number of History Category candidates, and the negative reputation that may partially suppress application enthusiasm, but the flagship disciplines like Law/Archaeology still strongly attract high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1409, with a range of 1198–1620.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 1409, range 1198–1620. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1100), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law Lv Zhenyu Class, Kuang Yaming Class). For rankings near the upper limit (beyond 1500), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 and use Tier 2 as a safe option. Jilin University's Law (A-level) and Archaeology (A+) are top liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.
